title: Thalictrum leve
taxonomy: Thalictrum leve is classified in the family of Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the buttercup family. This classification is based on the plant's shared characteristics and morphological features with other plants in the same family. uses: Thalictrum leve, also known as meadow rue, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. intro: Thalictrum leve, also known as Meadow Rue, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae.
